scenario.title: The MVP Scoper
scenario.context: You have a big vision for an AI product but limited time and resources. You need to scope an MVP that proves value while identifying what to defer, what to fake, and what's truly essential.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that scopes an AI product MVP, distinguishing essential features from nice-to-haves, and designing pragmatic shortcuts.
constraints: Identify what can be manually handled initially
scenario.exampleInput: AI writing assistant: Full vision includes personalization, style learning, multi-language, collaboration, templates, plagiarism check, SEO, integrations. 2 weeks to MVP that proves people will pay for AI writing help.
hints: What single feature proves the core value?
What can be a 'Wizard of Oz' (manual) initially?

rubric.name: Core Feature Identification
rubric.description: Is the core value proposition identified?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear core feature with value justification

rubric.name: Cut Decisions
rubric.description: Are deferral decisions clear and justified?

rubric.name: Timeline Realism
rubric.description: Is the scope achievable in timeline?
